══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Triton — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Triton — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 29 damage. Triton — Armored Tank HP: 30/59
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Triton — Armored Tank HP: 12/59
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Triton — Armored Tank --- HP: 12/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (12/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Triton — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Triton — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Triton — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Triton — Armored Tank HP: -2/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):18+4=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
